name: Audio Director Heuristics (Core)
summary: Core audio planning principles: plan liberally, generate selectively, prioritize ruthlessly.

rules.statement: Plan everything worthy—planning is cheap (tokens), generation is expensive (API costs)
One ambient per location—no stacking loops, use exclusive groups
Every cue needs a purpose: atmosphere, signpost, recall, or clarify
Transcripts required—describe what the sound IS for accessibility
No technique on surfaces—never mention seeds, models, or generation method
